name: Incident triage
description: Classify impact, isolate symptoms, and choose the first stabilizing action.

name: Observability
description: Use metrics, logs, traces, and service maps to explain system state.

name: Database recovery
description: Restore database service while protecting consistency and recovery point objectives.

name: API development
description: Design, build, and operate service APIs with clear contracts and failure behavior.

name: CI/CD
description: Build reliable pipelines with tests, deployment gates, and rollback paths.

name: Data engineering
description: Build and operate data pipelines, quality checks, and analytical datasets.

name: Security operations
description: Detect, investigate, contain, and communicate security events.

name: Communication
description: Communicate status, uncertainty, risk, and decisions to stakeholders.

name: Escalation judgment
description: Know when to escalate, who to involve, and how to frame the decision.

name: Cloud architecture
description: Design resilient cloud systems across compute, data, networking, and operations.
